notes: Official MCP Python SDK package mcp 1.28.1 was installed with the stable constraint >=1.28.1,<2.
Real production stdio client demo passed for tool discovery and all four tool calls.
Automated official-SDK stdio protocol integration test passed with a dependency-injected fake retriever.
MCP Inspector CLI 0.22.0 passed against the production stdio server using the isolated workspace npm cache .cache/npm-mcp-inspector; no elevated or administrator workaround was used.

Inspector verified the exact four-tool allowlist, input/output schemas, all four production tool calls, structured rejection of top_k=0, error sanitization, and a successful post-invalid tools/list call.
Consolidated Inspector evidence is recorded in evaluation/results/week7_mcp_inspector_verification.json.
